title: eryngium junceum subsp. erosum
intro: Eryngium junceum subsp. erosum, also known as the sea eryngo or eryngo, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of eryngium junceum subsp. erosum include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin conditions such as acne. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for medicinal use.
